# NIR8 Calculators

> Free online pharmaceutical assay and formula calculator for dispensing calculations. Supports F1, F2, F3 assay-based formulas and (A+C)-B lot quantity tracking across up to four lots, with water content and assay correction.

NIR8 Calculators is a single-page browser tool used by pharmaceutical dispensing staff to compute standard-to-issued quantity conversions during batch manufacturing. It runs entirely client-side; no data is sent to a server. Results are computed instantly as values are entered, and calculations can be printed for batch manufacturing records (BMR).

## Tools

- [Formula Calculator](https://nir8.pages.dev/): Computes F1, F2, and F3 assay-based formulas from quantity (Q), water content (W), and assay content (A).
- [(A+C)-B Calculator](https://nir8.pages.dev/): Tracks standard quantity (A), issued quantity (B), and a secondary standard (C) across four lots, with drug presets (e.g. Valacyclovir, Levetiracetam) and manual entry.

## Pages

- [About](https://nir8.pages.dev/about.html): What NIR8 Calculators is and who it's for.

## Notes

- This tool is for pharmaceutical dispensing calculation support. Results should always be independently verified before use in production records.
